description: A designed graphic showing a man with white-gray hair in a dark suit standing in the doorway of the Oval Office holding two paper takeout bags, facing a woman in a red shirt. Gold lettering on the wall reads 'The Oval Office'. Large serif text reads 'NO TAX ON TIPS' at the top and 'I'M LOVING IT!' at the bottom, with a House GOP logo.
notable_text: NO TAX ON TIPS; I'M LOVING IT!; The Oval Office
